case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. BRUCE PARSELY PAINTING

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUCE PARSELY PAINTING $10,890.00 PRINCIPAL, $855.27 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,045.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE PARSELY PAINTING

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE PARSELY PAINTING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
